name: python3-neotime
title: python3-neotime
description:
Nanosecond-precision temporal types for Python (Python 3)
This package contains a neotime module that defines classes for working with
temporal data to nanosecond precision. These classes comprise a similar set to
that provided by the standard library datetime module. Inspiration has also
been drawn from ISO-8601.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-neotime because Nanosecond-precision temporal types for Python (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-neotime as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-neotime with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-neotime --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
